alerts.description:
Starting at 10am on Sunday June 7, the Buffalo Pride Parade will cause reroutes along Elmwood Avenue. Bus routes along Elmwood from Rockwell Road at Buffalo State down to Edward Street in Allentown will be rerouted until about 3pm.
See reroute map for more info...
alerts.title: Pride Parade reroutes for 12,20,22,26,32 on June 7
